description.value: Price 14,000 gp; Slot none; CL 5th; Weight 5 lbs.; Aura faint transmutation DESCRIPTION Several alterations along the edges of this well-maintained leather saddle allow for the movement of a mount’s wings. The saddle grants a mount wearing it a +5 competence bonus on Fly checks, and grants the rider a +5 competence bonus on Ride checks. If the rider is unsaddled during flight, he is immediately subject to a feather fall effect. The mount additionally gains the benefits of any teamwork feats the rider possesses. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 7,000 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells fly, mount; Special creator must have 5 ranks in Ride
